title: Equivalent representations of percent problems
description: Identify expressions that can be used to solve percent problems, like 'What is 5% of 35?'.
topic_path: Get ready for fractions, decimals, & percentages

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following options have the same value as $5\%$ of $35$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{5\%}$ $\greenD{\text{of}}$ $\maroonD{35}$ is the same as $\blueD{5\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{35}$.

To solve $\blueD{5\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{35}$, we need to convert $\blueD{5\%}$ to either a decimal or a fraction.

Percent means per hundred, so $\blueD{5\%}$ is equivalent to $\blueD{\dfrac{5}{100}}$ which is also equal to $\blueD{5\div 100=0.05}$.

 $\blueD{5\%= \dfrac5{100} = 0.05}$

$\begin{align}\blueD{5\%}\ \text{of}\ \maroonD{35}&=\blueD{\dfrac5{100}}\cdot\maroonD{35}\\\\
&=\blueD{0.05}\cdot\maroonD{35}\\\\
&=1.75
\end{align}$

Are any of the other choices equivalent?

$5\cdot35=175$

The expression $5\cdot 35$ is **not** equivalent to $5\%$ of $35$.

$0.5\cdot0.35=0.175$

The expression $0.5\cdot0.35$ is **not** equivalent to $5\%$ of $35$.

$\dfrac5{10}\cdot35=17.5$

The expression $\dfrac5{10}\cdot35$ is **not** equivalent to $5\%$ of $35$.

The options that have the same value as $5\%$ of $35$ are:

- $\dfrac5{100}\cdot35$
- $0.05\cdot35$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following options have the same value as $30\%$ of $81$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{30\%}$ $\greenD{\text{of}}$ $\maroonD{81}$ is the same as $\blueD{30\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{81}$.

To solve $\blueD{30\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{81}$, we need to convert $\blueD{30\%}$ to either a decimal or a fraction.

Percent means per hundred, so $\blueD{30\%}$ is equivalent to $\blueD{\dfrac{30}{100}}$ which is also equal to $\blueD{30\div 100=0.3}$.

 $\blueD{30\%= \dfrac{30}{100} = 0.3}$

$\begin{align}\blueD{30\%}\ \text{of}\ \maroonD{81}&=\blueD{\dfrac{30}{100}}\cdot\maroonD{81}\\\\
&=\blueD{0.3}\cdot\maroonD{81}\\\\
&=24.3
\end{align}$

Are any of the other choices equivalent?

The fractions $\dfrac{30}{100}$ and $\dfrac{3}{10}$ are equivalent. So:

$\blueD{\dfrac{30}{100}}\cdot\maroonD{81}=\blueD{\dfrac{3}{10}}\cdot\maroonD{81}$

The expression $\blueD{\dfrac{3}{10}}\cdot\maroonD{81}$ is equivalent to $30\%$ of $81$.

$0.03\cdot 81=2.43$

The expression $0.03\cdot 81$ is **not** equivalent to $30\%$ of $81$.

$30\cdot 81=2{,}430$

The expression $30\cdot 81$ is **not** equivalent to $30\%$ of $81$.

The options that have the same value as $30\%$ of $81$ are:

- $\dfrac{30}{100}\cdot 81$
- $0.3\cdot 81$
- $\dfrac{3}{10}\cdot 81$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following options have the same value as $70\%$ of $80$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{70\%}$ $\greenD{\text{of}}$ $\maroonD{80}$ is the same as $\blueD{70\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{80}$.

To solve $\blueD{70\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{80}$, we need to convert $\blueD{70\%}$ to either a decimal or a fraction.

Percent means per hundred, so $\blueD{70\%}$ is equivalent to $\blueD{\dfrac{70}{100}}$ which is also equal to $\blueD{70\div 100=0.7}$.

 $\blueD{70\%= \dfrac{70}{100} = 0.7}$

$\begin{align}\blueD{70\%}\ \text{of}\ \maroonD{80}&=\blueD{\dfrac{70}{100}}\cdot\maroonD{80}\\\\
&=\blueD{0.7}\cdot\maroonD{80}\\\\
&=56
\end{align}$

Are any of the other choices equivalent?

The fractions $\dfrac{70}{100}$ and $\dfrac{7}{10}$ are equivalent. So:

$\blueD{\dfrac{70}{100}}\cdot\maroonD{80}=\blueD{\dfrac{7}{10}}\cdot\maroonD{80}$

The expression $\blueD{\dfrac{7}{10}}\cdot\maroonD{80}$ is equivalent to $70\%$ of $80$.

$0.7\cdot 0.8=0.56$

The expression $0.7\cdot 0.8$ is **not** equivalent to $70\%$ of $80$.

$70\cdot 80=5{,}600$

The expression $70\cdot 80$ is **not** equivalent to $70\%$ of $80$.

The options that have the same value as $70\%$ of $80$ are:

- $\dfrac{70}{100}\cdot 80$
- $0.7\cdot 80$
- $\dfrac{7}{10}\cdot 80$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following options have the same value as $60\%$ of $94$?**

hints:

$\begin{align}\blueD{60\%}\ \text{of}\ \maroonD{94}&=\blueD{\dfrac{60}{100}}\cdot\maroonD{94}\\\\

The expression $0.06\cdot 94$ is **not** equivalent to $60\%$ of $94$.

The expression $60\cdot 94$ is **not** equivalent to $60\%$ of $94$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following options have the same value as $10\%$ of $33$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{10\%}$ $\greenD{\text{of}}$ $\maroonD{33}$ is the same as $\blueD{10\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{33}$.

To solve $\blueD{10\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{33}$, we need to convert $\blueD{10\%}$ to either a decimal or a fraction.

Percent means per hundred, so $\blueD{10\%}$ is equivalent to $\blueD{\dfrac{10}{100}}$ which is also equal to $\blueD{10\div 100=0.1}$.

 $\blueD{10\%= \dfrac{10}{100} = 0.1}$

$\begin{align}\blueD{10\%}\ \text{of}\ \maroonD{33}&=\blueD{\dfrac{10}{100}}\cdot\maroonD{33}\\\\
&=\blueD{0.1}\cdot\maroonD{33}\\\\
&=3.3
\end{align}$

Are any of the other choices equivalent?

The fractions $\dfrac{10}{100}$ and $\dfrac{1}{10}$ are equivalent. So:

$\blueD{\dfrac{10}{100}}\cdot\maroonD{33}=\blueD{\dfrac{1}{10}}\cdot\maroonD{33}$

The expression $\blueD{\dfrac{1}{10}}\cdot\maroonD{33}$ is equivalent to $10\%$ of $33$.

The expression $0.1\cdot 0.33$ is **not** equivalent to $10\%$ of $33$.

The expression $10\cdot 33$ is **not** equivalent to $10\%$ of $33$.

The options that have the same value as $10\%$ of $33$ are:

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following options have the same value as $96\%$ of $25$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{96\%}$ $\greenD{\text{of}}$ $\maroonD{25}$ is the same as $\blueD{96\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{25}$.

To solve $\blueD{96\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{25}$, we need to convert $\blueD{96\%}$ to either a decimal or a fraction.

Percent means per hundred, so $\blueD{96\%}$ is equivalent to $\blueD{\dfrac{96}{100}}$ which is also equal to $\blueD{96\div 100=0.96}$.

 $\blueD{96\%= \dfrac{96}{100} = 0.96}$

$\begin{align}\blueD{96\%}\ \text{of}\ \maroonD{25}&=\blueD{\dfrac{96}{100}}\cdot\maroonD{25}\\\\
&=\blueD{0.96}\cdot\maroonD{25}\\\\
&=24
\end{align}$

Are any of the other choices equivalent?

$0.96\cdot 0.25=0.24$

The expression $0.96\cdot 0.25$ is **not** equivalent to $96\%$ of $25$.

$\dfrac{96}{100}\cdot \dfrac{25}{100}=0.24$

The expression $\dfrac{96}{100}\cdot \dfrac{25}{100}$ is **not** equivalent to $96\%$ of $25$.

$96\cdot 25=2{,}400$

The expression $96\cdot 25$ is **not** equivalent to $96\%$ of $25$.

The options that have the same value as $96\%$ of $25$ are:

- $\dfrac{96}{100}\cdot 25$
- $0.96\cdot 25$

assessment_items.question_content:

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following options have the same value as $25\%$ of $64$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{25\%}$ $\greenD{\text{of}}$ $\maroonD{64}$ is the same as $\blueD{25\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{64}$.

To solve $\blueD{25\%}\greenD{\times}\maroonD{64}$, we need to convert $\blueD{25\%}$ to either a decimal or a fraction.

Percent means per hundred, so $\blueD{25\%}$ is equivalent to $\blueD{\dfrac{25}{100}}$ which is also equal to $\blueD{25\div 100=0.25}$.

 $\blueD{25\%= \dfrac{25}{100} = 0.25}$

$\begin{align}\blueD{25\%}\ \text{of}\ \maroonD{64}&=\blueD{\dfrac{25}{100}}\cdot\maroonD{64}\\\\
&=\blueD{0.25}\cdot\maroonD{64}\\\\
&=16
\end{align}$

Are any of the other choices equivalent?

$25\cdot 64=1{,}600$

The expression $25\cdot 64$ is **not** equivalent to $25\%$ of $64$.

$64\div \dfrac{25}{100}=256$

The expression $64\div \dfrac{25}{100}$ is **not** equivalent to $25\%$ of $64$.

$25\div \dfrac{64}{100}= 39.0625$

The expression $25\div \dfrac{64}{100}$ is **not** equivalent to $25\%$ of $64$.

The options that have the same value as $25\%$ of $64$ are:

- $\dfrac{25}{100}\cdot 64$
- $0.25\cdot 64$
